en.name: Diastolic arterial pressure
en.shortDescription: Diastolic arterial pressure — the arterial blood pressure during cardiac relaxation (the lower number of a blood-pressure reading); any site, method or position.
en.longDescription:
## Definition & Clinical Context

Diastolic arterial pressure is the pressure inside the arteries during the relaxation phase of the heartbeat (diastole), when the heart refills between contractions. It is the lower of the two numbers in a standard blood-pressure reading (e.g., the "80" in 120/80). Measuring it produces a numeric pressure value, reported in millimetres of mercury (mmHg), obtained either non-invasively (an automated or manual cuff) or invasively (an arterial catheter connected to a pressure transducer). It is one of the core vital signs, recorded in virtually every clinical setting and continuously in the intensive care unit and operating room.

This concept set captures **numeric diastolic arterial pressure values** across all measurement sites, methods, body positions and respiratory phases. Systolic and mean arterial pressure are covered by dedicated concept sets, as is central venous pressure.

## Included Concepts

This concept set contains 25 standard concepts (19 LOINC + 6 SNOMED) organised below by what the source documents about the measurement. A concept may appear in more than one group. The default for an unqualified diastolic reading is *3012888 / 8462-4 — Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)* or its SNOMED equivalent *4154790 / 271650006 — Diastolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*.

### Generic diastolic pressure

- *3012888 / 8462-4 — Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: The generic diastolic blood pressure, with no site, method or position specified. Default mapping target for an unqualified value.
- *4154790 / 271650006 — Diastolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent of the generic diastolic blood pressure.
- *35610320 / 1091811000000102 — Diastolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED concept naming the diastolic component of arterial pressure; equivalent in meaning to the generic diastolic blood pressure.

### By measurement method

- *21492240 / 76535-4 — Diastolic blood pressure by Noninvasive (LOINC)*: Diastolic pressure measured non-invasively (e.g., automated oscillometric cuff), method stated.
- *4068414 / 174255007 — Non-invasive diastolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent for a non-invasively measured diastolic pressure.
- *21490851 / 76213-8 — Invasive Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Diastolic pressure derived from an invasive arterial line. Standard in the ICU and operating room.
- *4354253 / 251073000 — Invasive diastolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent for an invasively measured diastolic pressure.
- *21490777 / 75995-1 — Diastolic blood pressure by Continuous non-invasive monitoring (LOINC)*: Diastolic pressure from continuous non-invasive monitoring (e.g., finger-cuff volume-clamp devices).
- *37394653 / 1036571000000105 — Non-invasive central diastolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*: Non-invasively estimated central (aortic) diastolic pressure, as opposed to peripheral cuff pressure.

### By measurement site

- *3026099 / 8500-1 — Radial artery Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Diastolic pressure measured at the radial artery (the usual site for an arterial line).
- *3014005 / 8527-4 — Radial artery - right Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)* and *3020255 / 8526-6 — Radial artery - left Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Side-specified radial measurements.
- *3020528 / 8498-8 — Femoral artery Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Diastolic pressure measured at the femoral artery (an alternative arterial-line site).
- *3034397 / 8519-1 — Femoral artery - right Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)* and *3033568 / 8518-3 — Femoral artery - left Diastolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Side-specified femoral measurements.

### By patient position

Use these only when the source explicitly records body position with the measurement; otherwise use the generic concept.

- *3013940 / 8455-8 — Diastolic blood pressure--supine (LOINC)*: Measured lying flat on the back.
- *4236281 / 407557002 — Lying diastolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*: Measured lying down (SNOMED).
- *36304130 / 89267-9 — Diastolic blood pressure--lying in L-lateral position (LOINC)*: Measured lying on the left side (used in obstetrics).
- *3034703 / 8453-3 — Diastolic blood pressure--sitting (LOINC)*: Measured sitting.
- *3019962 / 8454-1 — Diastolic blood pressure--standing (LOINC)*: Measured standing (part of orthostatic assessment).

### By respiratory phase

- *3034095 / 8447-5 — Diastolic blood pressure--inspiration (LOINC)* and *3038119 / 8446-7 — Diastolic blood pressure--expiration (LOINC)*: Measured at a specified phase of breathing; used when respiratory variation in blood pressure is documented.

### By clinical condition

- *36304326 / 87740-7 — Diastolic blood pressure--W exercise (LOINC)*: Measured during physical exercise (e.g., stress testing).
- *36305114 / 87736-5 — Diastolic blood pressure--post exercise (LOINC)*: Measured after exercise.
- *36306043 / 89281-0 — Diastolic blood pressure--during anesthesia (LOINC)*: Measured under anaesthesia (perioperative monitoring).

## Excluded Concepts

The set is a curated list of numeric diastolic arterial pressure measurements. Out-of-scope concepts from the surrounding blood-pressure hierarchies are intentionally not included: ambulatory and 24-hour blood-pressure summaries, percentile/centile values, self-reported pressures, neonatal-at-birth pressures, baseline and on-admission encodings, and any non-numeric findings (e.g., "low diastolic blood pressure"). Systolic, mean and central venous pressures are captured by their own dedicated concept sets.

## Mapping Notes

- *Default concept*: When the source records a diastolic value with no site, method or position, map to Diastolic blood pressure (3012888 / 8462-4, LOINC), or its SNOMED equivalent (4154790 / 271650006) if the source is SNOMED-aligned. Do not infer a method or site that is not documented.
- *Invasive vs. non-invasive*: Map to the invasive concept (21490851 / 76213-8, LOINC) only when the source identifies an arterial line / invasive measurement, and to the non-invasive concept (21492240 / 76535-4, LOINC) only when a non-invasive method is stated. If the method is not documented, use the generic concept.
- *Cuff readings*: A routine automated cuff that does not state "non-invasive" explicitly should still map to the generic Diastolic blood pressure (3012888 / 8462-4, LOINC) unless the source labels the method.
- *Position*: Map to a positional concept only when body position is explicitly recorded with the reading.
- *Common source labels*: "DBP", "DAP", "PAD" (pression artérielle diastolique), "Diastolic", "NIBP diastolic" → Diastolic blood pressure (3012888 / 8462-4, LOINC). "ABP diastolic", "Art diastolic" (from an arterial line) → Invasive Diastolic blood pressure (21490851 / 76213-8, LOINC).
- *Units*: Diastolic arterial pressure is reported in mmHg.

fr.name: Pression artérielle diastolique
fr.shortDescription: Pression artérielle diastolique — la pression artérielle pendant la relaxation cardiaque (le chiffre le plus bas d'une mesure de tension) ; tout site, méthode ou position.
